mapper.select: with visible_sessions as ( select s.session_id from sessions s where s.status = 'ACTIVE' and ( s.created_by_user_id = #{userId} or exists ( select 1 from runs visible_runs where visible_runs.session_id = s.session_id and visible_runs.triggered_by_user_id = #{userId} ) or exists ( select 1 from session_messages visible_messages where visible_messages.session_id = s.session_id and visible_messages.sender_user_id = #{userId} ) ) ), ranked_runs as ( select r.id, r.session_id, r.run_id, r.status, r.updated_at, row_number() over ( partition by r.session_id order by r.updated_at desc, r.id desc ) as run_rank from runs r join visible_sessions vs on vs.session_id = r.session_id where r.status in ('PENDING', 'RUNNING', 'CANCELLING') ), active_runs as ( select id, session_id, run_id, status, updated_at from ranked_runs where run_rank = 1 ), latest_question_events as ( select e.run_id, e.event_id, e.type, e.occurred_at, row_number() over ( partition by e.run_id order by e.occurred_at desc, e.seq desc ) as event_rank from run_events e join active_runs ar on ar.run_id = e.run_id where e.type in ('question.asked', 'question.replied', 'question.rejected') ) select ar.session_id, ar.run_id, ar.status as run_status, case when qe.type = 'question.asked' then 'QUESTION' else null end as attention, case when qe.type = 'question.asked' then qe.event_id else null end as attention_event_id, case when qe.type = 'question.asked' then qe.occurred_at else null end as attention_at, ar.updated_at from active_runs ar left join latest_question_events qe on qe.run_id = ar.run_id and qe.event_rank = 1 order by ar.updated_at desc, ar.id desc
